title: Leaf Litter Recolor
description: Changes fallen leaves colors, making them more vibrant and natural. From brown tones to green and yellow shades, giving your world a fresh look without changing the vanilla style.

# Leaf Litter Recolor
A vibrant new look for Minecraft's forest floors
Breathe new life into your world with this lightweight resource pack that reimagines Minecraft’s fallen leaves.
🌿 Dull browns are replaced by lush greens and golden tones, turning the forest floor into a vivid, organic carpet — perfect for builders, explorers, and nature lovers alike.

### **🎯 Key Features:**

- Fully compatible with modern Minecraft versions (including 1.21+)
- Only affects fallen leaves – vanilla-friendly
- Ideal for autumn-themed builds or natural landscapes

**📦 Resolution: 16x | Format: .zip | Supports OptiFine & Vanilla**

### **🔗 Want to support my work?**
If you enjoy this pack and want to help me make more like it, consider **supporting** me on **Patreon**! Every contribution helps me grow and continue updating Leaf Litter Recolor.

📸 Don’t forget to share your builds using this pack!
Got suggestions or want to chat? I’m always open to feedback.
